title: Gordanluk Tall planter Concrete effect plant pot Designed Flowerpot with plant riser extra large plant pots indoor plant pots outdoor flower pot (Concrete Effect Grey, 40 x 75cm)
features: Elevate your gardening experience with our versatile Flowerpot Collection, now featuring an innovative black insert designed to enhance your plants' presentation. Meticulously crafted flowerpots, available in a range of sizes to accommodate various plant types and arrangements.
Dimensions (in cm): 14cm x 26cm 19cm x 36cm 25cm x 46.5cm 30cm x 57cm 35cm x 68cm 40cm x 75.3cm

Crafted from eco-friendly plastic, our flowerpots combine durability with style. Emulating the charm of the concrete effect, they feature a sophisticated textured finish available in both timeless black and contemporary light grey. The addition of the black insert not only provides structural support but also raises your plants, allowing for better visibility and showcasing their natural beauty. Whether you're a seasoned gardener or just starting your botanical journey, our Flowerpot Collection offers the perfect balance of functionality and aesthetics.

Key Features: Six sizes to accommodate various plants and spaces. Eco-friendly plastic construction for durability and longevity. Concrete effect finish in black and light grey for a modern aesthetic. Innovative black insert included for enhanced plant presentation. Suitable for indoor and outdoor use.
Transform your living spaces into lush sanctuaries with our Flowerpot Collection. Add a touch of elegance and sophistication to your home or garden today!
